ModMetaData.name: Gerrymon's RJW Retexture
ModMetaData.author: Gerrymon
ModMetaData.description: A collection of vanilla-fied textures of RJW and a few of its submods. Quick summary: -- Basic RJW: New textures for items and prisoner chain -- S16's Extention: New textures for most bondage gears, piercings, and vibrators -- Peculiar Institution: Compatibility with Stylized Slave Collars -- Petification: Complete retexture and making the gears more medieval-friendly -- Dynamics: New textures for the apparels
